name: BigBuy
description: BigBuy dropshipping API for catalog discovery, product data, prices, stock, shipping quotes, orders, order status, and tracking.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: BigBuy API token from your BigBuy control panel.

tools.name: auth_status
tools.description: Check whether the BigBuy token is valid and active.

tools.name: purse_get
tools.description: Get BigBuy purse/account balance information.

tools.name: categories_list
tools.description: List BigBuy catalog categories.

tools.name: category_get
tools.description: Get one BigBuy catalog category by ID.

tools.name: products_list
tools.description: List BigBuy catalog products. Pair with product_information and prices/stock tools for sellable catalog import.

tools.name: product_get
tools.description: Get one BigBuy product by ID.

tools.name: product_information_list
tools.description: List localized BigBuy product descriptions/information. Use isoCode for the target language when needed.

isoCode.description: Language ISO code, for example en, es, fr, de, it.

tools.name: product_information_get
tools.description: Get localized BigBuy product information by product ID.

tools.name: product_information_get_by_sku
tools.description: Get localized BigBuy product information by SKU.

tools.name: product_images_list
tools.description: List BigBuy image records for all products.

tools.name: product_images_get
tools.description: Get image records for one BigBuy product.

tools.name: product_prices_list
tools.description: List BigBuy product prices.

tools.name: product_stock_list
tools.description: List BigBuy product stock by handling days.

tools.name: product_stock_get
tools.description: Get BigBuy stock by handling days for one product.

tools.name: product_variations_list
tools.description: List BigBuy product variations.

tools.name: product_variations_get
tools.description: Get BigBuy variations for one product.

tools.name: variation_prices_list
tools.description: List BigBuy variation prices.

tools.name: variation_stock_list
tools.description: List BigBuy product variation stock by handling days.

tools.name: variation_stock_get
tools.description: Get BigBuy variation stock by handling days for one product.

tools.name: order_check
tools.description: Validate a BigBuy order payload before creating it. Pass BigBuy's CustomerOrderProcess object as order.

tools.name: order_create
tools.description: Create a BigBuy dropshipping order. Pass BigBuy's CustomerOrderProcess object as order.

tools.name: order_get
tools.description: Get a BigBuy order by internal BigBuy order ID.

tools.name: order_get_by_reference
tools.description: Get a BigBuy order by merchant reference.

tools.name: order_statuses_list
tools.description: List BigBuy order statuses.

tools.name: shipping_carriers_list
tools.description: List BigBuy shipping carriers.

tools.name: shipping_quote_order
tools.description: Quote BigBuy shipping options for one cart/order. Pass BigBuy's CartShippingOption request as shipping_request.

tools.name: shipping_lowest_cost_by_country
tools.description: Get the lowest BigBuy shipping cost by country for a cart request.

tools.name: shipping_lowest_costs_get_by_country
tools.description: Get stored lowest BigBuy shipping costs for one destination country.

countryIsoCode.description: Destination country ISO code, for example ES or FR.

tools.name: tracking_carriers_list
tools.description: List BigBuy tracking carriers.

tools.name: tracking_order_get
tools.description: Get tracking data for one BigBuy order.

tools.name: tracking_orders_list
tools.description: Get tracking data for multiple BigBuy orders. Pass BigBuy's TrackingOrder request as request.
